name: konzup-radar-bot
description: Bot Scanner Semanal - Descobre novos eventos no Polymarket relacionados a turismo

scripts.deploy-all: npm run deploy-scanner && npm run deploy-api
scripts.create-scheduler: gcloud scheduler jobs create http konzup-radar-weekly-scan --location=us-central1 --schedule='0 6 * * 1' --uri='https://us-central1-gen-lang-client-0598434360.cloudfunctions.net/scanPolymarket' --http-method=POST --oidc-service-account-email=gen-lang-client-0598434360@appspot.gserviceaccount.com

author: Konzup Hub
